evalAfter: (async()=>{const w=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const b=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(b)b.click();await w(2500);try{MOS.nav('catalogo')}catch(e){}await w(4500);const opts=()=>{const m=document.getElementById('plusCtxMenu');return m?[...m.querySelectorAll('button')].map(x=>(x.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim().split(' ')[0]).filter(Boolean):[]};let out={};try{MOS.abrirPlusContextual('IDPRO0000523');await w(500);out.granel=opts();MOS._cerrarPlusCtx&&MOS._cerrarPlusCtx();await w(300);MOS.abrirPlusContextual('IDPRO0000235');await w(500);out.derivado=opts();MOS._cerrarPlusCtx&&MOS._cerrarPlusCtx();}catch(e){out.err=String(e&&e.message||e);}return out;})()
